prompt:
Declaration (in prose format):

A distributed ralph loop. 6 implementer agents on sonnet-4.6 plus 1 reviewer on opus-4.7, max 2 agents per repo to avoid file-lock thrash, pull tasks from fix_plan.md in github.com/lambda-run/ops. Each agent claims via atomic branch lock with 10m TTL; release on merge, abandon, or TTL expiry. Conflicts resolve last-write-wins after rebase; 3 rebase conflicts escalates a task to the reviewer pool. Gossip claim, merge, and block events to slack:#ralph-bus. Loop continues while backlog has open tasks; stops on budget > $50, kill switch, or error rate > 30%. On worker crash, release claims and requeue with retry++; after 3 retries park for human. Log claim/commit/fail events to loki; track success rate, p50 task seconds, claim contention; surface to human when error rate > 20% or queue stuck > 30m. Terminate on backlog empty, budget exhausted, or human signals done.

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- Distributed ralph loop
- 6 implementer agents
- Implementer agents run on sonnet-4.6
- 1 reviewer agent
- Reviewer agent runs on opus-4.7
- Maximum 2 agents per repo
- Task source repository: github.com/lambda-run/ops
- Task source file: fix_plan.md
- Agents pull tasks from fix_plan.md
- Each agent claims tasks via atomic branch lock
- Atomic branch lock TTL: 10 minutes
- Release task claim on merge
- Release task claim on abandon
- Release task claim on TTL expiry
- Conflict resolution uses rebase
- Conflict resolution policy after rebase: last-write-wins
- Escalate task to reviewer pool after 3 rebase conflicts
- Gossip claim events to slack:#ralph-bus
- Gossip merge events to slack:#ralph-bus
- Gossip block events to slack:#ralph-bus
- Continue loop while backlog has open tasks
- Stop loop when budget > $50
- Stop loop on kill switch
- Stop loop when error rate > 30%
- On worker crash, release claims
- On worker crash, requeue task
- On worker crash, increment retry count
- After 3 retries, park task for human
- Log claim events to loki
- Log commit events to loki
- Log fail events to loki
- Track success rate
- Track p50 task seconds
- Track claim contention
- Surface to human when error rate > 20%
- Surface to human when queue stuck > 30 minutes
- Terminate on backlog empty
- Terminate on budget exhausted
- Terminate when human signals done
